title: Lilac Jackson
description: Even I don't know, what it would mean. Just a Michel Jackson inside a lilac.
body:
# Only me...
I think that everyone in the world wanted this resoursepack, but no one had ever made it. But here I am, the god of this world. I brought to you all this resoursepack that you all wanted:
## 🧛‍♂️👨‍🦱🌺🌸🌷Lilac Michel Jackson🌺🌸🌷👨‍🦱🧛‍♂️
heee he
![lonley Michel Jackson in this beautiful world](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4s4JEjim/images/caa81e3b219ba4b8644eaca298e7665c7c4d17f8.jpeg)
![Here's absolutely normal lilac](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4s4JEjim/images/406572a5de9f4b533c99f53620f9cc0c96a3dab8.png)
![Exept...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4s4JEjim/images/6ad3e450cdb1adb06c5714a90039e2e74983214f.png)
![a PLANTy of Michels](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4s4JEjim/images/7a21164d2cc9ffb0fac0919a676111d086236355.png)
